cover: System architecture diagram: 'Salesforce Data Cloud Vector Search: Semantic Case Router'. Light grey background with faint grid. Dark bold header block 'Semantic Case Router on Data Cloud Vector Search'. Subtitle 'Case text → vector search → queue confidence → Agentforce 2.0 handoff'. Top-right: profile badge 'Bennie Joseph | Architect'. LAYER 1 'Salesforce Service Cloud' (pastel blue): modules 'Case Subject + Description', 'Product + Entitlement', 'Omni-Channel Queue'. LAYER 2 'Data Cloud Native Vector Search' (pastel purple): modules 'Routing_Corpus__dlm', 'Case Embeddings', 'VECTOR_DISTANCE Top 10'. LAYER 3 'Decision Layer' (pastel green): modules 'Confidence Score', 'Queue Mapping', 'Human Override'. Central node 'Semantic Router' with rotating arrow, dotted directional connectors to all layers. INTEGRATION LAYER (upper right): 'Agentforce 2.0 Custom Action' and 'Salesforce API v64.0'. BOTTOM PANEL 'Production Guardrails': sub-modules 'Thresholds', 'Audit Log', 'Fallback Queue' with flow arrows. Rounded rectangle containers, dotted arrowheads, micro vector icons, modern sans-serif fonts, publication-ready engineering diagram.
images: System architecture diagram: 'Data Cloud Vector Search Case Router'. Light grey background with faint grid. Dark bold header block 'Case Routing Retrieval Pipeline'. Subtitle 'Resolved cases + knowledge + curated examples become searchable routing memory'. Top-right: profile badge 'Bennie Joseph | Architect'. LAYER 1 'Ingestion Sources' (pastel blue): modules 'Resolved Case History', 'Knowledge Articles', 'Manual Routing Examples'. LAYER 2 'Data Cloud Processing' (pastel purple): modules 'Text Normalization', 'Embedding Generation', 'Routing_Corpus__dlm Vector Index'. LAYER 3 'Runtime Routing' (pastel green): modules 'New Case', 'Top 10 Semantic Matches', 'Queue Confidence Score'. Central node 'Native Vector Search' with rotating arrow, dotted directional connectors to all layers. INTEGRATION LAYER (upper right): 'Agentforce 2.0 Action' and 'Omni-Channel Queue Assignment'. BOTTOM PANEL 'Guardrails': sub-modules 'Region Filter', 'Product Filter', 'Fallback Queue' with flow arrows. Rounded rectangle containers, dotted arrowheads, micro vector icons, modern sans-serif fonts, publication-ready engineering diagram.

Split-screen comparison infographic: 'Keyword Case Routing vs Data Cloud Vector Search'. Deep navy blue bold header. LEFT COLUMN 'OLD WAY: Keyword Rules' (soft red/grey, bold blue-grey header box): blocks for 'Contains refund → Billing', 'Contains connection → Network Support', 'Assignment rules hidden in Flow' each with small warning icon. Central flow diagram showing tangled lines between Case, Flow, Assignment Rule, Queue Transfer. RIGHT COLUMN 'NEW WAY: Semantic Router' (soft green/blue, bright blue header box): blocks for 'Top 10 Similar Resolved Cases', 'Queue Confidence Score', 'Agentforce 2.0 Explanation'. Central glowing node 'Routing Corpus in Data Cloud' with clean straight lines to Case, Knowledge, Queue. Speedometer labeled FAST pointing green. Clean vector SaaS aesthetic, deep navy/teal/blue palette on light blue-grey background.
